title: S + V + except that / except for + N

formulas.formula: S + V + except that + S + V
formulas.zh: 主語＋動詞＋除了……之外（後接子句）
主語＋動詞＋除了……之外（後接名詞）

explanation: except that 與 except for 均表達「除了……之外」的例外情況。except that 後接完整子句（含主語與動詞），用於說明某個具體狀況；except for 後接名詞或名詞片語，用於指出某個事物或要素。兩者不可互換。需特別注意與 besides 的區別：besides 表「另外加上」（累加），而 except/except for 表「排除」（減除）。此句型常用於考試、評論或說明完整性時，強調某個例外改變了整體狀況。

examples.eng: The concert was wonderful, except that the sound system failed once.
examples.chi: 演唱會很精彩，除了音響系統故障了一次。

examples.eng: Everything is ready for the trip except for the plane tickets.
examples.chi: 旅行的一切都準備好了，除了飛機票。

examples.eng: The project would have succeeded except that we ran out of budget.
examples.chi: 這個專案本來會成功，除了我們的預算用完了。

examples.eng: The exam was easy except for the last three questions.
examples.chi: 考試很簡單，除了最後三題。

adj_table_for.zh: 本來會……（與過去事實相反）

extension.tip: 判斷使用 except that 或 except for 的關鍵：看例外部分是否為完整敘述。若是具體事件或動作狀況，用 except that + 子句；若是單純名詞或物品，用 except for + 名詞。except 表減除，beside/besides 表加上，兩者意義相反。

examples.test: The day was perfect __ the rain in the afternoon.
examples.result: → 填 except for（名詞 the rain）；不填 except that（因為主要句無動詞缺失）

examples.test: Everyone passed the test __ John forgot to submit his answer sheet.
examples.result: → 填 except that（後接完整子句 John forgot...）；不填 except for（except for 後無法直接接子句）

examples.test: X: I love this restaurant besides the slow service. / O: I love this restaurant except for the slow service.
examples.result: → 此處應用 except for（排除），不用 besides（besides 會變成「我喜歡這間餐廳，另外還喜歡慢的服務」，邏輯錯誤）

extension.note: except that 連接『動詞片段』，except for 連接『名詞片段』；except 是減除，besides 是加入。

exercises.sentence: The meeting was productive except that we ran out of time.
exercises.translation: 會議很有成效，除了我們時間用完了。

parts: The house is in excellent condition
exercises.sentence: The house is in excellent condition except for a few broken windows.
exercises.translation: 這間房子狀況很好，除了幾扇破窗。

parts: The vacation would have been perfect
my friend got sick halfway through.
exercises.sentence: The vacation would have been perfect except that my friend got sick halfway through.
exercises.translation: 度假本來會完美，除了我朋友到一半時生病了。

parts: All the equipment is working properly
exercises.sentence: All the equipment is working properly except for the printer in the office.
exercises.translation: 所有設備都正常運作，除了辦公室的印表機。
